tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• AG Kripal Singh was a former Indian cricketer known for his all-round abilities.
  • He was born in Madras (now Chennai) and played domestic cricket for Tamil Nadu.
  • Kripal Singh represented India during the 1950s and early 1960s.
  • He was a right-handed batsman and off-spin bowler.
  • He made his Test debut in 1955 against New Zealand.
  • Kripal was known for his steady batting and useful bowling contributions.
  • He played an important role in domestic cricket and was a consistent performer.
  • After retirement, he remained associated with cricket through coaching and mentoring.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in Test cricket during the 1950s.
  • Known for contributions as an all-rounder.
  • Performed consistently in domestic cricket.
  • Played key roles in Tamil Nadu cricket team.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Full name is A.G. Kripal Singh.
  • One of the early Indian all-rounders.
  • Played in an era dominated by spin bowling.
  • Respected figure in domestic cricket.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• AG Milkha Singh was a talented Indian batsman known for his aggressive style.
  • He was born in Madras (Chennai) and played domestic cricket for Tamil Nadu.
  • Milkha Singh made his international debut in the mid-1970s.
  • He was known for his attacking batting and fearless approach.
  • Although his international career was short, he left a strong impression.
  • He was highly successful in domestic cricket competitions.
  • His performances earned him recognition as a powerful striker of the ball.
  • He later contributed to cricket through coaching and development roles.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in international cricket.
  • Known for aggressive batting style.
  • Strong performer in domestic tournaments.
  • Played key innings for Tamil Nadu.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Full name is A.G. Milkha Singh.
  • Known for fearless batting approach.
  • Had a short but impactful international career.
  • Popular in domestic cricket circuits.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Aakash Chopra is a former Indian cricketer and well-known cricket commentator.
  • He was born in Agra, Uttar Pradesh, and played domestic cricket for Delhi.
  • Chopra was a technically sound opening batsman.
  • He made his Test debut for India in 2003.
  • He was known for his defensive technique and patience at the crease.
  • Chopra played a key role in providing solid starts in Test matches.
  • After retiring from cricket, he became a popular commentator and analyst.
  • He is also active on digital platforms, sharing cricket insights.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Played Test cricket for India.
  • Successful domestic cricket career.
  • Renowned cricket commentator.
  • Known for technical batting skills.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Famous cricket analyst and YouTuber.
  • Strong defensive batsman.
  • Transitioned successfully into commentary.
  • Highly respected cricket expert.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Aashish Kapoor is a former Indian cricketer known for his off-spin bowling.
  • He was born in Chennai and played domestic cricket for Tamil Nadu.
  • Kapoor was an all-rounder who contributed with both bat and ball.
  • He made his international debut in the 1990s.
  • He was particularly effective in domestic cricket tournaments.
  • Kapoor was known for his ability to control the game with spin bowling.
  • He also contributed useful runs in the lower order.
  • After retirement, he remained involved in cricket development.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in international cricket.
  • Successful domestic all-rounder.
  • Known for off-spin bowling.
  • Played key roles in domestic competitions.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Specialized in off-spin bowling.
  • Useful lower-order batsman.
  • Played mainly in the 1990s era.
  • Respected domestic cricket player.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Aavishkar Salvi is a former Indian fast bowler known for his swing bowling.
  • He was born in Mumbai and played domestic cricket for Mumbai.
  • Salvi gained attention for his performances in domestic cricket.
  • He made his international debut in 2003.
  • He was known for his ability to swing the ball effectively.
  • Salvi had a short international career but was promising.
  • He played a significant role in domestic tournaments.
  • After retirement, he became involved in coaching and mentoring players.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in international cricket.
  • Successful domestic fast bowler.
  • Known for swing bowling ability.
  • Contributed to Mumbai cricket team.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Specialized in swing bowling.
  • Played for Mumbai in domestic cricket.
  • Short international career.
  • Transitioned into coaching roles.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Abbas Ali Baig was a stylish right-handed batsman who represented India during the late 1950s and 1960s.
  • He was born in Hyderabad and gained early recognition through domestic cricket performances.
  • Baig made his Test debut in 1959 against England and impressed with his technique.
  • He became popular for his elegant stroke play and calm batting style.
  • Baig played several important innings during overseas tours.
  • He was part of the Indian team during a transitional phase in cricket history.
  • His performances helped establish his reputation as a dependable middle-order batsman.
  • After retirement, he remained connected to cricket and contributed to the sport.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in Test cricket during the 1950s and 1960s.
  • Known for stylish and technically sound batting.
  • Played key innings in overseas matches.
  • Important contributor to India's batting lineup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Born in Hyderabad, India.
  • Known for elegant batting technique.
  • Played during early development years of Indian cricket.
  • Respected figure in cricket history.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Abdul Basith is a young Indian cricketer known for his all-round abilities.
  • He has emerged through domestic cricket and age-group tournaments.
  • Basith is a right-handed batsman and part-time bowler.
  • He gained recognition for his consistent performances in domestic competitions.
  • He represents his state team in Indian domestic cricket.
  • Basith is considered a promising talent for the future of Indian cricket.
  • He continues to develop his skills and aims to secure a regular place in the national team.
  • His performances have attracted attention from selectors and fans alike.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Strong performances in domestic cricket.
  • Recognized as an emerging all-rounder.
  • Selected in competitive domestic squads.
  • Consistent performer in age-level cricket.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Young and upcoming cricketer.
  • All-rounder role.
  • Focused on domestic cricket growth.
  • Future prospect for Indian team.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Abdul Samad is a powerful Indian all-rounder known for his explosive batting.
  • He hails from Jammu and Kashmir and rose through domestic cricket ranks.
  • Samad gained popularity through his performances in the Indian Premier League.
  • He is known for his ability to hit big sixes and finish matches.
  • Samad is also a useful leg-spin bowler.
  • He has been recognized as one of the most promising young talents.
  • His aggressive style makes him a valuable player in T20 formats.
  • He continues to work on his consistency and all-round skills.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Breakthrough performances in IPL.
  • Recognized as a power-hitter.
  • Emerging all-round talent.
  • Strong domestic cricket record.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Known for hitting long sixes.
  • Plays as a finisher.
  • Also bowls leg-spin.
  • One of the youngest rising stars.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Abey Kuruvilla is a former Indian fast bowler known for his height and bounce.
  • He was born in Kerala but played domestic cricket for Mumbai.
  • Kuruvilla made his international debut in the late 1990s.
  • He was known for extracting bounce from pitches due to his height.
  • He played a few Test matches and ODIs for India.
  • Kuruvilla was a consistent performer in domestic cricket.
  • After retirement, he worked in cricket administration.
  • He later served as a national selector for India.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in international cricket.
  • Successful domestic fast bowler.
  • Served as national selector.
  • Known for bounce and pace.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Tall fast bowler.
  • Played for Mumbai domestically.
  • Worked as selector after retirement.
  • Known for disciplined bowling.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• Abhijeet Tomar is an Indian cricketer known for his performances in domestic cricket.
  • He hails from Rajasthan and represents the state team.
  • Tomar is a right-handed batsman with a solid technique.
  • He gained recognition through consistent domestic performances.
  • He has played important innings in tournaments like the Ranji Trophy.
  • Tomar is considered a promising batsman for the future.
  • He continues to improve his game and aim for higher levels.
  • His dedication and consistency make him a rising player.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Strong domestic cricket performances.
  • Key player for Rajasthan team.
  • Consistent run-scorer.
  • Emerging batting talent.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Represents Rajasthan.
  • Right-handed batsman.
  • Focused on domestic cricket success.
  • Upcoming talent.
